title: Generated filter fragment would need review before entering the data layer
impact_summary: Generated code can look production-ready while still embedding unsafe string interpolation or trust assumptions.
why_this_matters: Generated code review is one of the most current and relatable audit stories for startup teams.
evidence_fixture: disabled raw filter builder represented as a generated helper fragment
suggested_patch_summary: Replace string-built filters with typed helpers and keep generated code behind explicit review gates.
verification_summary: Verified as safe because the snippet is disabled and the runtime uses static arrays.
replay_regression_note: Show the disabled helper, then point to the patch diff that swaps it for a typed allowlisted filter.
